summary: Iteration 69: Market Intelligence API and Frontend Testing Complete. All 8 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend Market page loads within 10-15s with all required sections visible. Live data from HubSpot CRM (86 deals, $13,685 pipeline) is being aggregated successfully via /api/market-intelligence.

ui_bugs.issue: CRM channel shows 'Connect' button instead of 'Live' badge even though API returns status='connected' with provider='HubSpot'. Likely a React state timing issue where channels state isn't updating properly after API fetch.

issues: Button nested inside button warning in InsufficientDataAlert component (HTML validation issue)
